title: Kitchen Units
desc: Lacquered, PVC, and Melamine finishes. High-gloss or matte. Custom colours and granite worktops.

title: Wardrobes
desc: Built-in and free-standing options with frosted, glass, or panel sliding doors. Any finish, any size.

title: Bathroom Units
desc: Vanity units, toilet enclosures, and mirror cabinets in lacquer and moisture-resistant finishes.
